audit_items.proof_trace: aspeed_peci_clk_release is a 2-line devm cleanup callback that calls clk_disable_unprepare(data) once and returns immediately; clk_disable_unprepare does not free its argument (it only manages runtime enable/prepare state), so no pointer is freed in this function. After the single call to clk_disable_unprepare, data is never referenced again, and the devm framework guarantees the callback is invoked exactly once — ruling out both use-after-free and double-free.
